name: DataForSEO
one_liner: Pay-as-you-go SEO and web-scraping data provider exposing SERP, keyword, backlink, on-page, and marketplace data via a unified REST/JSON API.
access_notes: Sign up instantly for an account and an API password is auto-generated (login = account email), no human approval. A free trial with limited free requests is offered on signup; beyond that it is prepaid pay-as-you-go with a $50 minimum payment. Credentials work immediately for API calls.
api_notes: Large REST/JSON API spanning ~12 modules: SERP, Keywords Data, DataForSEO Labs, Backlinks, OnPage, Business Data, Domain Analytics, Content Analysis, Merchant (Amazon/Google Shopping), App Data, AI Optimization, and Databases. Each module has many endpoints (live and task-based/queued), easily 100+ operations total.
mcp_notes: Vendor ships an official MCP server at github.com/dataforseo/mcp-server-typescript (published Apr 2025 on GitHub, May 2025 on npm), plus a hosted endpoint at https://mcp.dataforseo.com/mcp. Covers 10 API modules. Community forks also exist.
main_blocker: No hard gate; self-serve credentials work immediately. Only friction is prepaid billing ($50 minimum) after the limited free trial, and task-based endpoints require polling or webhook callbacks.

evidence.claim: API uses HTTP Basic auth with API login (account email) and an auto-generated API password, Base64-encoded in the Authorization header.
Pay-as-you-go pricing with a $50 minimum payment and a free trial available.
REST/JSON API organized into SERP, Keywords Data, Labs, Backlinks, OnPage, Merchant, Business Data, and more modules; supports webhooks/pingback-postback callbacks.
Official DataForSEO MCP server hosted on GitHub/npm and at mcp.dataforseo.com covering 10 API modules.

open_questions: Exact free-trial allowance (number of free requests/credit) not confirmed from official docs in this pass.
